_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Managing decisions and risks involves making and justify decisions characterised by high levels of risk, impact and complexity; build consensus between organisations (private or public) or highly independent and diverse stakeholders; being trusted by senior risk owners as an expert in security; apply risk methodologies at the most complex levels of risk.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-007 (RM, cosine: 0.550), DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.515). Shared vocabulary: [risk]. DDaT-only terms [apply, build, characterised, complex, complexity, consensus] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.843 (P=0.832, R=0.855). R exceeds P by 0.023 — the WIDAI KSA's 26 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 52 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Managing decisions and risks involves making and justify decisions characterised" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.636 > STS 0.515 (gap +0.121). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.9%. Shared tokens: [risk]. DDaT-only: [apply, build, characterised, complex, complexity, consensus]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].
